post.description:
PRE-BOOKING flow starting point.

**TransactionID Rules:**
- TransactionID is generated by FE and passed through
- Same TransactionID must be used for subsequent OfferPrice and OrderCreate calls

**Trip Types:**
- One-way: 1 item in originDestList
- Round-trip: 2 items in originDestList
- Multi-city: N items in originDestList

**Passenger Rules:**
- Max 9 passengers total
- INF count must not exceed ADT count
- Passenger types: ADT (Adult 12+), CHD (Child 2-11), INF (Infant 0-1)

**Cabin Classes:**
- Y: Economy
- W: Premium Economy
- C: Business
- F: First

**Criteria Options:**
- direct: true for non-stop flights only
- airlinePreference: preferred airline IATA codes
- programCriteria: contract fare programs
- promotionCriteria: promotional fares
- specialFareCriteria: special fare programs

200.description: Flight search results - returns raw PolarHub response

post.description:
## Overview
Retrieves detailed pricing information for a selected Offer from AirShopping.

## Usage
1. Call AirShopping API to retrieve the Offer list
2. Select the desired Offer and call OfferPrice
3. Using the same transactionId is required

## MatchResult Handling
- **FULL**: Single Offer covers entire itinerary
  - Only 1 Offer included in the offers array
- **PARTIAL**: Separate Offer needed per leg
  - Multiple Offers in the offers array (2 for round-trip)

## Fields by Workflow
| Workflow | Additional Fields |
|-----------|----------|
| WF_PB_DEFERRED | None (default) |
| WF_PB_IMMEDIATE | None (default) |
| WF_PB_SEAT | seatSelection |
| WF_PB_SERVICE | bookingInstructions |
| WF_PB_SEAT_SERVICE | seatSelection + bookingInstructions |

## Seat Selection (WF_PB_SEAT)
```json
{
  "offerItemId": "...",
  "paxRefId": ["PAX1"],
  "seatSelection": {
    "column": "G",
    "row": "20"
  }
}
```

## Ancillary Service (WF_PB_SERVICE)
```json
{
  "offerItemId": "...",
  "paxRefId": ["PAX1"],
  "bookingInstructions": {
    "text": ["TTL10KG"]
  }
}
```

## FFN (Loyalty Program)
- Supported by AF and KL airlines only
- Include loyaltyProgramAccount in paxList

MatchResult-Full.description: When a round-trip itinerary is provided as a single Offer

MatchResult-Partial.description: When a round-trip itinerary is provided as separate Offers

400.description: Bad request (missing required fields, invalid format)

500.description: Server error or PolarHub API error

post.description:
POST-BOOKING booking modification API.

## Supported Modes

### 1. AcceptSelectedQuotedOfferList
- **Purpose**: Seat/service change, voluntary itinerary change after ticketing
- **Workflows**: WF_HELD_SEAT, WF_HELD_SERVICE, WF_TKT_SEAT, WF_TKT_SERVICE, WF_TKT_VOLCHANGE
- **Prerequisite APIs**: OrderQuote, SeatAvailability, ServiceList

### 2. AcceptOrderItemList
- **Purpose**: Hold confirmation (legacy method, some airlines only)
- **Workflow**: WF_HELD_CONFIRM (legacy)
- **Deprecated**: Most airlines use AcceptRepricedOrder

### 3. AcceptRepricedOrder
- **Purpose**: Hold itinerary change, delay ticketing (Hold confirmation)
- **Workflows**: WF_HELD_ITIN, WF_HELD_CONFIRM
- **Prerequisite APIs**: OrderReshop (itinerary change), OrderQuote (delay ticketing)
- **CRITICAL**: Using this for post-ticketing itinerary change causes "INVALID SEGMENT SELECTION" error!

### 4. UpdatePax
- **Purpose**: Passenger information change
- **Workflow**: WF_HELD_PAX
- **Note**: AY, SQ support Add/Delete only (for modify, use Add then Delete order)

### 5. AcceptChange
- **Purpose**: OCN (Operation Change Notification) acceptance
- **Workflow**: WF_TKT_OCN
- **Field**: orderItemRefId (array of OrderItem IDs to accept)

### 6. PNR Split (UpdatePax + ReasonCode='DIV')
- **Purpose**: PNR split
- **Workflow**: WF_HELD_SPLIT
- **Required**: reasonCode='DIV', updatePax[{ newPaxRefId }], paxList

### 7. Payment Timelimit Extension (ReasonCode='104')
- **Purpose**: Payment timelimit extension
- **Supported airlines**: TK only
- **Required**: reasonCode='104', paxList

## Airline-Specific Notes

- **BA**: Travel agency email and postal address required
- **AF, KL**: First OrderChange for itinerary change requires empty PaymentList array
- **AY**: Delay ticketing before issuance requires 2 OrderChange calls (Quote -> Change1 -> Change2)

delayTicketingWithQuote.description: Use OfferID from OrderQuote as AcceptRepricedOrder.OfferRefID

200.description: Order changed successfully - returns raw PolarHub response

post.description:
## Overview
OrderCreate API is used to process flight booking and ticket issuance.

## Ticketing Modes
- **Deferred Ticketing**: Booking only, ticketing later (no PaymentList)
- **Instant Ticketing**: Booking and issuing immediately (with PaymentList)

## Form of Payment
- **BSP Cash**: All airlines (except TR)
- **BSP Credit Card**: HA, KE
- **Agent Deposit**: TR only

## Required ContactInfo
Some airlines require Travel Agency contact info:
- **BA**: Email, PostalAddress
- **AF/KL**: Email, Phone

## Important Notes
- TransactionID must be same as OfferPrice
- BA US routes: Passport & PostalAddress required
- HA/KE: IssuingCountryCode required in IdentityDoc

## Overview
OrderRetrieve API is used to get booking details by Order ID.

## Usage
- Retrieve booking status and details
- Check ticket numbers
- View payment status

## Important Notes
- TransactionID should be new for Post-Booking operations
- Same TransactionID should be used within a Post-Booking workflow

## Overview
OrderCancel API is used to cancel a booking.

## Cancel Types
- **Full Cancel**: Cancel entire booking (no OrderItemRefID)
- **Partial Cancel**: Cancel specific items (with OrderItemRefID)
- **Pax Cancel**: Cancel specific passengers (with PaxRefID)

## Important Notes
- Hold bookings: Can be cancelled without fee
- Ticketed bookings: May require OrderReshop first for refund calculation

post.summary: Get quote for order changes (seat/service or ticketing)
post.description:
OrderQuote API - Change quote inquiry

## 2 Modes

### Mode 1: SelectedOffer (Seat/Service quote)
- **WF_TKT_SEAT**: Seat change quote after ticketing
- **WF_TKT_SERVICE**: Service addition quote after ticketing
- **WF_HELD_SERVICE**: Service addition quote while in Hold status
- Uses OfferID from SeatAvailability or ServiceList response

### Mode 2: RepricedOrderID (Delay ticketing fare recalculation)
- **WF_HELD_CONFIRM**: Fare recalculation before ticketing a Hold booking
- **CRITICAL**: Required for some airlines such as SQ, AY, KL!
- Use the response OfferID in OrderChange AcceptRepricedOrder

## Next Steps
OrderQuote response -> OrderChange (AcceptSelectedQuotedOfferList or AcceptRepricedOrder)

## Transaction ID
- Generated by FE and passed through (middleware generation forbidden)
- Same ID must be maintained within the same Post-Booking session

200.description: Quote retrieved successfully - returns raw PolarHub response

400.description: Invalid request (missing required fields or invalid format)

500.description: Internal server error or PolarHub API error

post.summary: OrderReshop - Itinerary change search or refund quote
post.description:
## Overview
Searches for alternative flights for itinerary changes or retrieves refund quotes.

## Use Cases

### 1. Itinerary Change Search
- **Workflow**: WF_HELD_ITIN (Hold status), WF_TKT_VOLCHANGE (after ticketing)
- **ActionContext**: "8" (Voluntary), "9" (Involuntary)
- Uses **updateOrder.reshopOrder**

### 2. Refund Quote
- **Workflow**: WF_TKT_REFUND
- Uses **updateOrder.cancelOrderRefId** (string!)

### 3. Delay Ticketing (LH, EK, etc.)
- **Workflow**: WF_HELD_CONFIRM
- Uses **updateOrder.repricedOrderRefId** (string!)

## Next Steps

### After Itinerary Change Search:
```
OrderReshop → OrderQuote(optional) → OrderChange(AcceptRepricedOrder)
```

### After Refund Quote:
```
OrderReshop → OrderCancel(RefundQuoteID)
```

## Important Notes
- **Delete is an array**: `delete: [{ orderItemRefId: "...", retainServiceId?: [...] }]`
- **CancelOrderRefID is a string**: Passed as a string, not an object
- **transactionId**: Generated by FE and passed through (middleware generation forbidden)

itinerary_change.description: Search for alternative flights on a different date

partial_change_with_retain.description: Change segment but retain ancillary services

involuntary_change.summary: Involuntary Change (response to airline schedule change)

refund_quote.description: Get refund quote for order cancellation

delay_ticketing.description: Reshop for delay ticketing confirmation (Held Booking)

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request format or missing required fields

500.description: Internal Server Error - PolarHub API error

post.description:
Retrieves seat availability information for a flight segment.

**Supported Workflows:**
- **WF_PB_SEAT**: Prime Booking with seat selection
- **WF_PB_SEAT_SERVICE**: Prime Booking with seat + service
- **WF_HELD_SEAT**: Post-Booking seat change (Hold status)
- **WF_TKT_SEAT**: Post-Booking seat change (Ticketed status)

**Usage:**
- Prime Booking: Use `offer` field with AirShopping response data
- Post-Booking: Use `order` field with OrderRetrieve response data

**IMPORTANT:**
- TransactionID must be provided by FE (pass-through principle)
- For Prime Booking: Reuse same TransactionID from AirShopping
- For Post-Booking: Use same TransactionID from OrderRetrieve

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: HMAC authorization (optional - for HMAC auth pass-through)

parameters.name: Digest
parameters.description: SHA-512 digest (optional - for HMAC auth pass-through)

parameters.name: x-date
parameters.description: RFC1123 timestamp (optional - for HMAC auth pass-through)

200.description:
Seat availability data returned successfully.

Response contains:
- `ALaCarteOffer`: Seat options with pricing
- `DataLists`: Reference data (segments, etc.)

Returns raw PolarHub API response without transformation.

400.description: Invalid request - missing or invalid parameters

500.description: Internal server error or PolarHub API error

post.description:
## Overview
Retrieves the list of ancillary services.

## Usage
### Prime Booking (Offer-based)
Query services using offer information from the AirShopping response:
```json
{
  "transactionId": "...",
  "offer": {
    "responseId": "from_air_shopping",
    "offerId": "from_air_shopping",
    "owner": "SQ",
    "offerItems": [{ "offerItemId": "...", "paxRefId": ["PAX1"] }]
  },
  "paxList": [{ "paxId": "PAX1", "ptc": "ADT" }]
}
```

### Post-Booking (Order-based)
Query services using order information from the OrderRetrieve response:
```json
{
  "transactionId": "...",
  "order": {
    "orderId": "TSDEV-20250821-7bb482f96fe0a2f9"
  },
  "paxList": [{ "paxId": "PAX1", "ptc": "ADT" }]
}
```

## Supported Services
| Type | Airlines |
|------|----------|
| Baggage | AF, EK, KL, LH, LX, OS, SQ, TR |
| Seat Upgrade | LH, LX, OS |
| FFN (Loyalty) | AF, KL |

## Workflow
- Prime: AirShopping -> **ServiceList** -> OfferPrice -> OrderCreate
- Held: OrderRetrieve -> **ServiceList** -> OrderQuote -> OrderChange
- Ticketed: OrderRetrieve -> **ServiceList** -> OrderQuote -> OrderChange

Prime Booking (Offer).description: Offer-based service inquiry for Prime Booking

Prime Booking (Offer without Items).description: Service inquiry using Offer only without OfferItem

With Loyalty Program (FFN).description: Inquiry including FFN (mileage) information (AF, KL supported)

500.description: Server error or PolarHub API error

info.title: PolarHub Whitelabel Middleware
info.description: NDC API Gateway for PolarHub Integration

airlineId.description: List of preferred airline IATA codes

transactionId.description: Transaction ID (32-char hex, generated by FE). Same ID must be used for OfferPrice and OrderCreate.

sender.description: Sender information (uses environment variables if not provided)

feAuthHeaders.description: FE HMAC authentication headers (generated from environment variables if not provided)

originDestList.description: Origin-Destination list (1 for one-way, 2 for round-trip, N for multi-city)

passengers.description: Passenger counts by type (max 9 passengers total)

cabin.description: Cabin class (Y: Economy, W: Premium Economy, C: Business, F: First)

criteria.description: Search criteria (airline preference, direct flights, fare programs)

DataLists.description: Data lists containing detailed information (segments, fares, etc.)

transactionId.description: Transaction ID (generated by FE, must use the same value as AirShopping)

offers.description: Selected offers - supports multiple offers (multiple offer selection needed when MatchResult=PARTIAL)

paxList.description: Passenger list (keep the same as AirShopping request). Supports birthDate and loyaltyProgramAccount.

sender.description: Sender information (Optional - uses environment variables if not provided)

feAuthHeaders.description: FE HMAC authentication headers (Optional - generated from environment variables if not provided)

pointOfSale.description: Point of Sale country code (default: KR)

workflow.description: Workflow type - price inquiry type (select based on whether seat/service is included)

criteria.description: Search criteria (contract fare, promotion, special fare, existing order reference)

transactionId.description: Transaction ID (same value as the request)

PricedOffer.description: Priced offer with detailed pricing information

AugmentationPoint.description: Augmentation point for additional airline-specific data

selectedPricedOffer.description: List of selected priced offers from OrderQuote/SeatAvailability/ServiceList

offerRefId.description: Offer Reference IDs. Use OfferID from OrderReshop if available, otherwise use OrderID

orderItemRefId.description: Order Item Reference IDs to accept

acceptRepricedOrder.description: Hold itinerary change, delay ticketing (WF_HELD_ITIN, WF_HELD_CONFIRM)

updatePax.description: Passenger information change (WF_HELD_PAX), used with ReasonCode=DIV for PNR split

transactionId.description: Transaction ID (32-char hex, generated by FE)

sender.description: Optional - uses env if not provided

reasonCode.description: Reason code: DIV=PNR split, 104=Payment timelimit extension (TK)

repricedOrderId.description:
Delay ticketing (WF_HELD_CONFIRM) - maps to Query.RepricedOrderID

IMPORTANT: Different from changeOrderChoice.acceptRepricedOrder!
- acceptRepricedOrder: Only passes OfferRefID array
- repricedOrderId: Passes OrderID + OrderItemRefID object

Usage example (delay ticketing):
```json
{
  "orderId": "TSDEV-20260126-xxx",
  "repricedOrderId": {
    "orderId": "TSDEV-20260126-xxx",
    "orderItemRefId": ["AIR-1-2", "SRV14"]
  }
}
```

changeOrderChoice.description: Change mode selection (can be omitted when using repricedOrderId)

paxList.description: Passenger list (required for UpdatePax, PNR Split)

contactInfoList.description: Contact info list (required for some airlines such as BA)

paymentList.description: Payment list (seat/service purchase, delay ticketing, etc.)

criteria.description: Search criteria (contract fare, promotion, special fare, existing order reference)

citizenshipCountryCode.description: Citizenship Country Code (required if no identityDoc)

residenceCountryCode.description: Residence Country Code (required if no identityDoc)

transactionId.description: Transaction ID (32-digit UUID without hyphens, must be same as OfferPrice)

sender.description: Sender (Travel Agency) - Optional, defaults to env config

contactInfoList.description: Contact Information List (Travel Agency + Passengers). Travel Agency contact (CTC_TA1) is required for BA/AF/KL.

paymentList.description: Payment List (Required for Instant Ticketing, Optional for Deferred Ticketing)

transactionId.description: Transaction ID for post-booking session (32-char hex, generated by FE)

orderId.description: Order ID to retrieve (returned from OrderCreate response)

sender.description: Sender information (optional - uses env if not provided)

transactionId.description: Transaction ID (32-char hex, generated by FE, same as OrderRetrieve)

refundQuoteId.description: Refund Quote ID (required for TICKETED refund, obtained from OrderReshop)

orderItemRefId.description: Specific Order Item IDs to cancel (partial cancel)

paxRefId.description: Specific Passenger IDs to cancel (pax cancel)

sender.description: Sender information (optional - uses env if not provided)

offerId.description: Offer ID from SeatAvailability or ServiceList

retainServiceId.description: List of RetainService IDs to keep

transactionId.description: Transaction ID (32-char hex, provided by FE)

sender.description: Sender info (optional - uses env vars if not provided)

selectedOffer.description:
Mode 1: Seat/Service quote
- Use for WF_TKT_SEAT, WF_TKT_SERVICE, WF_HELD_SERVICE
- Offer from SeatAvailability or ServiceList response

repricedOrderId.description:
Mode 2: Held booking confirmation quote (WF_HELD_CONFIRM)
- CRITICAL: Required for SQ, AY, KL before ticketing held orders
- OrderQuote response OfferID used in OrderChange AcceptRepricedOrder

affect.description: Specify affected OrderItems with RetainService options

criteria.description: Search criteria (direct, airline preference, contract fare, promotion, special fare, existing order reference)

retainServiceId.description: Service IDs to retain (for partial itinerary change)

cabin.description: Cabin class (Y: Economy, W: Premium Economy, C: Business, F: First)

cancelOrderRefId.description: Order ID for refund quote (STRING type, not object!)

repricedOrderRefId.description: Order ID to be repriced for deferred ticketing (LH, EK, etc.). STRING type!

transactionId.description: Unique transaction ID (32-char UUID without hyphens). Must be provided by FE.

updateOrder.description: Update order payload. Choose one: reshopOrder (itinerary change) OR cancelOrderRefId (refund)

sender.description: Sender information (optional - uses env vars as fallback)

feAuthHeaders.description: FE HMAC auth headers for pass-through (optional)

criteria.description: Search criteria (contract fare, promotion, special fare, existing order reference)

DataLists.description: Data lists (flight segments, pax info, etc.)

offerItemId.description: Offer Item ID from OfferPrice response

offerItems.description: Offer items (optional - for specific seat availability)

orderItems.description: Order items (optional - for specific seat availability)

transactionId.description: Transaction ID (32-char hex, generated by FE)

sender.description: Optional - uses environment variables if not provided

criteria.description: Search criteria (direct, airline preference, contract fare, promotion, special fare, existing order reference)

transactionId.description: Transaction ID (UUID without hyphens) - must be provided by FE

sender.description: Sender information (optional, uses env vars as fallback)

feAuthHeaders.description: HMAC auth headers from FE (optional, generates if not provided)

offer.description: Offer information for Prime Booking (from AirShopping/OfferPrice response)

order.description: Order information for Post-Booking (from OrderRetrieve response)
